notes: Wall-clock timings measured with PowerShell Measure-Command on the local machine.
These are rerun values from the latest measurement pass.
Runtimes are environment-dependent and should be treated as rough comparison values.
Docker-based tools were measured with cached images.

tools.label: Semgrep
tools.command: docker run --rm -v <dvna>:/src returntocorp/semgrep semgrep --config p/javascript --config p/security-audit /src --json

tools.label: CodeQL
tools.note: Measured via full CodeQL database create + analyze using benchmarks/.cache/codeql/codeql.cmd (javascript-security-and-quality suite).
